name: resumatch
description: CV Matching Game — MigraCode fullstack project

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix shared && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix frontend && npm run test --prefix backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix shared && npm run typecheck --prefix frontend && npm run typecheck --prefix backend
